title: Not overdue unpaid booked invoice totals GET schema
description: A schema for retrieval of the totals of not overdue unpaid booked invoices.

netAmountInBaseCurrency.description: The total invoice amount for all booked, unpaid and not overdue invoices in the base currency of the agreement before all taxes and discounts have been applied.

invoiceCount.description: The number of booked, unpaid and not overdue invoices.

maxDate.description: The latest date of any booked, unpaid and not overdue invoice.

minDate.description: The earliest date of any booked, unpaid and not overdue invoice.

grossRemainderInBaseCurrency.description: The gross total remaining to be paid on the booked unpaid not overdue invoices.

customers.description: A reference to the invoices totals booked unpaid not overdue customer resource.

accountingYears.description: A reference to the invoices totals booked unpaid not overdue accounting years resource.

periods.description: A reference to the invoices totals booked unpaid not overdue periods resource.

employees.description: A reference to the invoices totals booked unpaid not overdue employees resource.

self.description: A reference to the invoices totals booked unpaid not overdue resource.
